chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Bail Application No.D-28 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G. = At the very outset, learned D.P.G has pointed out that instant bail application has been preferred against Order dated 14-04- 2025 passed in Bail Application No.28 of 2025, by the Anti- Terrorism Court, Shaheed Benazirabad and, therefore, same ought to have been filed before the Circuit Court, Hyderabad. Although learned counsel for the applicant claims that since the place of incident falls within the jurisdiction of P.S Khadro, therefore, this bail application has been filed before this Court. However, the contention of learned D.P.G appears to be correct and since the Appellate Court against the order(s) passed by the Anti-Terrorism Court, Shaheed Benazirabad is Circuit Court at Hyderabad, hence instant bail application is also to have been filed before Circuit Court at Hyderabad. In view of above, instant bail application is disposed of with liberty to the applicant to file fresh bail application before the Circuit Court, Hyderabad. JUDGE JUDGE 2 “Saleem” 3
